02About me

Hello there, I'm Anisha.

I study business, but what really interests me is how brands talk to people, and why some ideas stay with us while others don't.

I like working on things that need both thinking and doing — planning content, coordinating people, fixing details, and making sure ideas don't stay only on paper.

What I enjoy most is the process behind it all: understanding the brief, shaping the idea, and seeing it come together. Still learning, still experimenting, still figuring it out as I go.
